method_summary: ClinEnv is an interactive benchmark that evaluates LLMs as attending physicians through Longitudinal Inpatient Simulation, where models must query four specialized agents at each decision stage before committing to medications, procedures, and diagnoses.
key_innovation: Making the information-acquisition gap directly measurable through scoring both decisions and the information gathering process.
best_result: 0.31 decision F1 for the strongest model
limitations_stated: Models continue to issue redundant queries as cases progress
Information-acquisition gap is invisible to outcome-only evaluation
title: ClinEnv: An Interactive Multi-Stage Long Horizon EHR Environment for Agents
